stories.title: Follow live: Cavs seek first win vs. series-leadin...
stories.summary: Live coverage of the Detroit Pistons vs. Cleveland Cavaliers NBA game on ESPN, including live score, highlights and updated stats.

stories.title: Cox, longtime Braves manager, WS champ, dies
stories.summary: Bobby Cox, longtime manager of the Atlanta Braves and a World Series champion in 1995, has died at the age of 84.

stories.title: Harbaugh: Decision on OBJ could wait until camp
stories.summary: Giants coach John Harbaugh said he spoke to Odell Beckham Jr. three to four times in the past week as they remain in touch about reuniting. But they will "play it out over the next month and into training camp" before making a decision.

stories.title: Spurs take 2-1 series lead behind Wemby's gem
stories.summary: Victor Wembanyama had 39 points, 15 rebounds and more game-wrecking defense for the Spurs, who took a 2-1 series lead with a 115-108 victory over the Timberwolves.

stories.title: Finch calls out Brothers' 'unprofessional behavior...
stories.summary: Timberwolves coach Chris Finch called it "completely unprofessional behavior" for official Tony Brothers to confront him on two separate occasions during a fourth-quarter stoppage in Game 3.
